subject: Add LOG component robot healthcheck
commit_message:
Add LOG component robot healthcheck

fixing incorrect service names

Issue-ID: OOM-914

Change-Id: I59e0150781094c85fe335811381b627c265cda57
Signed-off-by: Neal Chatterley <nealch@amdocs.com>
Signed-off-by: Mandeep Khinda <mandeep.khinda@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Initial review looks ok - can you post some test results - just the console pass message - thanks

Patch Set 2:

Neal, I will patch a clean VM tonight to verify the patch before merge

Patch Set 4:

Neal, perhaps we may want to roll the three container checks into one where kibana is essentially the FE, and logstash is the BE - like in SDC
